'''fagïfzïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabidiol|arabidiol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabidiol|arabidiol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| fagïfzïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fægïfzïfth || fægïfzïfj || fægïfzïfsh || fægïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fagïfgïfzïfth || fagïfgïfzïfj || fagïfgïfzïfsh || fagïfgïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fagïfzïfth || fagïfzïfj || fagïfzïfsh || fagïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fagïffzïffth || fagïffzïffj || fagïffzïffsh || fagïffzïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || fagïfzïfïf || fagïfzïfïf || fagïfzïfïf || fagïfzïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || fagïfzïfth || fagïfzïfj || fagïfzïfsh || fagïfzïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || fagïfzïfïfl || fagïfzïfïfl || fagïfzïfïfl || fagïfzïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || fagïfzïfïfïf || fagïfzïfïfïf || fagïfzïfïfïf || fagïfzïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || fagïfzïfïfn || fagïfzïfïfn || fagïfzïfïfn || fagïfzïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || fagïfzïfïforo || fagïfzïfïforo || fagïfzïfïforo || fagïfzïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
